summary: Iteration 21 - All features tested and working. Admin About tab shows image upload for Your Photo, About Page Cards (Philosophy, Impact), and Mission & Vision sections. Admin Programs tab content section editor has Section Type dropdown (journey, who_for, experience, why_now, cta, custom), ImageUploader for each section, and Font Styling Options (bold, italic, font family, size, color). Program detail pages show section titles in Lato Bold font (fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: Lato), 'Your Experience' section has black/dark background (#1a1a1a), and default sections include The Journey, Who It Is For?, Your Experience, Why You Need This Now?. Backend settings API returns about_philosophy, about_impact, about_mission, about_vision fields. /about page renders philosophy and mission content from settings.
critical_code_review_comments: AboutSettingsTab.jsx: Correctly implements Your Photo ImageUploader, About Page - Cards (Our Philosophy, Work & Impact), About Page - Mission & Vision (Our Mission, Our Vision) with data-testid attributes

AdminPanel.jsx: Content section editor has Section Type dropdown with 6 options (journey, who_for, experience, why_now, cta, custom), ImageUploader per section, and Font Styling Options (expandable details section with title/subtitle/body styling)

ProgramDetailPage.jsx: TITLE_DEFAULTS uses fontFamily: 'Lato', sans-serif with fontWeight: 700 (bold), experience section renders with background: #1a1a1a (dark), getDefaultSections() returns all 4 default sections
AboutPage.jsx: Renders philosophy-card and impact-card with content from settings, mission-vision section with Our Mission and Our Vision text
models.py: SiteSettings includes about_philosophy, about_impact, about_mission, about_vision fields, ContentSection model has section_type and style dictionaries
seed_data_creation: Test sections created and restored in test_iteration21_about_sections.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 21 features working: 1) Admin About tab with ImageUploader for Your Photo, Philosophy/Impact/Mission/Vision textareas, 2) Admin Programs tab with Section Type dropdown (6 options), ImageUploader per section, Font Styling Options (B/I/color/size/font), 3) Program detail pages with Lato Bold (700) section titles, dark #1a1a1a background on 'experience' section, 4 default sections (journey/who_for/experience/why_now), 4) /about page renders philosophy/mission content from settings API. Phone OTP is MOCKED.

admin_about_tab.Your Photo ImageUploader: PASS - Image upload section visible with Upload Image/Use URL buttons
admin_about_tab.About Page - Cards heading: PASS - Section heading 'About Page - Cards' visible

admin_programs_content_sections.Section Type dropdown: PASS - Has 6 options: journey, who_for, experience (Dark BG), why_now, cta, custom
admin_programs_content_sections.ImageUploader per section: PASS - 'Section Image URL (optional)' with Upload Image/Use URL buttons
admin_programs_content_sections.Font Styling Options: PASS - Expandable details with Title/Subtitle/Body style controls (B, I, color, size, font)

program_detail_page.Default sections: PASS - The Journey, Who It Is For?, Your Experience, Why You Need This Now? all visible

backend_settings_api.PUT /api/settings about fields: PASS - All 4 fields can be updated and persisted

about_page_rendering.Philosophy card: PASS - data-testid='philosophy-card' renders with content from settings
about_page_rendering.Impact card: PASS - data-testid='impact-card' renders with content from settings
about_page_rendering.Mission & Vision section: PASS - data-testid='mission-vision' with Our Mission/Our Vision headings
